name: Depths of Darkness
short_description: You are assigned as part of a four-person team to investigate a nuclear weapons facility that has lost communication with the government, only to find that the tunnel is occupied by creatures. You need to find the secret agent within your team and uncover the mystery behind the creatures.
detailed_description:
With a government assignment, you are sent as a four-person team to investigate a state nuclear weapons depot where communication has been lost. You enter the tunnel where the nuclear depot is located through the depths of the forest. However, you find that the tunnel is occupied by predatory animals and various creatures. You learn that there is a hidden agent among your team, and things become even more complicated. Now you have two objectives: find the agent among you and uncover the secret of these creatures.

Game Features:
  • Escape or Fight Against Invasive Creatures: You can either run from dangerous creatures or defeat them to continue your journey.
  • Explore the Environment and Collect Items: Search the dark and mysterious surroundings to find essential items for survival.
  • Interact with NPCs: Engage in dialogues with characters in the game to uncover the deeper story.
  • Follow the Clues: NPCs provide important clues during their conversations. Pay close attention to these dialogues to solve the mysteries.
  • Tense and Atmospheric Environment: A dark and suspenseful world full of fear and excitement awaits you.

supported_languages: English, Turkish, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Bulgarian, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Hungarian, Norwegian, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Ukrainian, Greek, Czech, Swedish
